data-ml.L3: Comfortable with platform tooling. Deploys new code to production using established templates and defined patterns. Leverages the existing ecosystem of capabilities and tools confidently.
data-ml.L4: Proficient with platform tooling; leverages it to solve new, unscoped use cases. Manages cross-team tooling dependencies with appropriate documentation and SLO/SLAs. Contributes concrete requirements for platform improvements.
data-ml.L5: Native-level mastery of the team's platform tooling. Contributes to platform tools and defines requirements for new capabilities. Opinionated in buy-vs-build decisions. Improves the ecosystem as they work; partners with platform owners to raise the bar.
data-ml.L6: Defines requirements for and designs platform tools. Makes organizational buy-vs-build decisions for data and ML tooling. Sets the standard for how the org evaluates and evolves its data and ML platform ecosystem.

capabilities.intent: Your command of the tools, platforms, and infrastructure specific to your domain

capabilities.name: Domain Methodology

swe-ic.L1: Learning the team's development practices: branching strategies, code review norms, testing conventions, and deployment procedures. Follows established processes with guidance.
swe-ic.L2: Applies development methodologies to well-defined problems. Understands the team's engineering practices and why they exist. Participates constructively in code reviews and retrospectives.
swe-ic.L3: Applies agile, design, and engineering practices to complex, ambiguous problems. Proactively improves team processes. Can lead a sprint, own a planning cycle, or drive a post-mortem effectively.
swe-ic.L4: Defines and enforces methodology standards for the team. Drives process improvement initiatives. Coaches teammates on effective engineering practices and quality standards.
swe-ic.L5: Sets methodology standards for the organization. Drives adoption of engineering excellence practices at scale. Defines the organization's approach to delivery, quality, and engineering culture.
swe-ic.L6: Shapes the methodology philosophy for the engineering organization. Contributes to industry thinking on software engineering practices, DevOps, and delivery culture.

data-ml.L1: Basic understanding of dimensional data modeling and how it enables analytics queries. Can design a simple data model based on well-defined requirements with guidance from a manager or peer.
data-ml.L2: Designs and implements basic dimensional data models from well-defined requirements. Understands schema design for query performance in BI tools; can make and implement recommendations for structural improvement.
data-ml.L3: Designs complex dimensional data models from ambiguous requirements with minimal guidance. Builds data solutions with maintenance and technical debt in mind. Proactively identifies opportunities for self-service functionality and automation in recurring data processing patterns.
data-ml.L4: Orchestrates and implements data curation processes across an entire business domain. Designs real-time data processing pipelines supporting live analytics and ML models. Has a strong eye for architectural enhancements that enable self-service and automation at scale.
data-ml.L5: Makes informed, opinionated decisions on system-wide orchestration, data architecture, storage solutions, ingestion mechanisms, and data mapping strategies. Partners with platform and engineering teams to manage cross-cutting dependencies and improve the shared data ecosystem.
data-ml.L6: Strategically evaluates and implements patterns to optimize data management across the organization. Defines org-wide data modeling standards and architecture principles. Leads the organization's data and ML engineering strategy.

capabilities.intent: Your fluency with the methods, processes, and practices specific to your domain

competencies.intent: The specialized knowledge, tools, and methods of your particular track

dimensions.intent: The technical skills and knowledge that underpin your work — from craft and shared engineering foundations to the specialized tools of your domain.
